package rulefixtures

import (
	"sort"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_before_linear_dedup: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag full sorts used only to remove duplicates where map-backed membership would scale better.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario503Positive(values []string) string {
	for range values {
		sort.Sort(sort.StringSlice(values))
	}
	if len(values) == 0 { return "" }
	return values[0]
}
